name: Chat input
goal: Composite chat composer with auto-growing textarea, send/stop/attach buttons, and Enter-to-submit behaviour.
description: A self-contained chat composer widget that grows the textarea as the user types (up to max-rows), emits ce-chat-submit on Enter or send-button click, switches to a stop button while busy, and optionally renders an attach button. All buttons and icons are overrideable via named slots.

props.name: value
props.description: Live textarea contents. Settable by host for controlled-input use. Not reflected back to attribute.

props.name: busy
props.description: When true the send button is replaced by a stop button.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the textarea and all action buttons.

props.name: maxLength
props.description: Hard character limit passed to the textarea. 0 means unlimited.

props.name: allowAttach
props.description: Renders the attach (paperclip) button when true.

props.name: rows
props.description: Initial textarea row count. The textarea grows up to max-rows.

props.name: maxRows
props.description: Upper bound for autogrow. Beyond this height the textarea scrolls.

props.name: submitOnEnter
props.description: When false, Enter inserts a newline and submission is only possible via the send button. Not reflected: set via JS property for the false case.

events.name: ce-chat-submit
events.description: Fires when Enter (no Shift) is pressed or the send button is clicked. Empty or whitespace-only values are suppressed.

events.name: ce-chat-stop
events.description: Fires when the stop button is clicked or Escape is pressed while busy=true.

events.name: ce-chat-attach
events.description: Fires when the attach button is clicked. Only available when allow-attach=true.

events.name: ce-chat-input
events.description: Fires on every textarea input event, mirroring native input. Detail carries the current value.

slots.name: prefix
slots.description: Content rendered above the textarea (e.g. a model-picker chip).

slots.name: suffix
slots.description: Content rendered below the buttons row (e.g. a character counter or hint text).

slots.name: attach-icon
slots.description: Override the default paperclip SVG inside the attach button.

slots.name: send-icon
slots.description: Override the default arrow-up SVG inside the send button.

slots.name: stop-icon
slots.description: Override the default square SVG inside the stop button.

cssVariables.name: --ce-muted
cssVariables.description: Textarea placeholder and attach-button default color.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-2
cssVariables.description: Gap between action buttons; textarea bottom padding; actions row bottom padding.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-3
cssVariables.description: Textarea vertical padding and prefix/suffix horizontal padding.

cssVariables.name: --ce-color-blue
cssVariables.description: Send button text and hover border.

cssVariables.name: --ce-color-red
cssVariables.description: Stop button text and hover border.

cssVariables.name: --ce-focus-ring
cssVariables.description: Focus-visible ring on buttons and the composer container.

cssVariables.name: --ce-transition-fast
cssVariables.description: Transition timing for border, shadow, and button state changes.

a11y.role: none (host); textarea has aria-label mirroring placeholder
a11y.notes: The textarea carries aria-label equal to its placeholder. Buttons carry aria-label (Send message, Stop generation, Attach file). Focus-within on the container raises border and adds focus-ring. Escape while busy emits ce-chat-stop. prefers-reduced-motion disables transitions.
